build.commands: wsl --shell-type login -- cargo build --locked {{ ARGS }} --target-dir target-linux
build.description: Build all crates in debug mode using WSL

build:release.commands: wsl --shell-type login -- cargo build --locked --release {{ ARGS }} --target-dir target-linux
build:release.description: Build all crates in release mode using WSL

lint.description: Completely lints (type-checks, formats, runs Clippy) the project using WSL

test.commands: wsl --shell-type login -- cargo test --workspace --all-features --locked {{ ARGS }} --target-dir target-linux
test.description: Run all workspace tests using WSL
